title: Mellow Sweet Mediterranean Chestnut Flatbread
description: A sweet and savory Mediterranean dish featuring chestnuts and double-rise bread, perfect for a solo dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and salt.
Gradually add olive oil and honey, mixing until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and roll it out into a flat circle.
Spread the mashed chestnuts over the dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Top the chestnuts with crumbled feta cheese and pitted kalamata olives.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before slicing and serving.
